strategy: He is immune to all damage until you crack his code, so do not waste turns attacking through the Invulnerability aura.
Kill the Sunken Sam minions to reveal the code. Each minion defeated reveals the next of four numbers.
The four numbers are pip costs. Cast spells of exactly those pip costs at Dan, in order. A 0 means a 0-pip spell like a wand hit or 0-pip Treasure Card.
Match all four correctly to strip the Invulnerability, then burst him. A wrong pip cost resets the sequence to the start.
Hit with Death (+25% incoming) once he is vulnerable; avoid Life (45% resist). He is only 6140 health.
cheatNotes: He starts immune to all damage via a -300% Invulnerability aura. You cannot hurt him until you crack the code.
The code is four pip-costs you must hit him with in order. Each Sunken Sam you defeat reveals the next number, so kill minions to read it.
He picks one of nine possible codes. Cast spells whose pip costs match the revealed digits, in order; a 0 means a 0-pip spell like a wand hit.
Getting the fourth digit right strips his Invulnerability (he casts a harmless Supernova). Burst him through the 6140 health now.
A wrong pip cost resets the whole sequence back to the first digit, so input carefully.
